LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; DEFENDANT 101 LOMBARD STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, EVEN ASSUMING THAT THE RULE OF DEFERENCE APPLIES. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT PROCEEDED ARBITRARILY RATHER THAN IN BAD FAITH BY IMPOSING A DISPROPORTIONATE BURDEN ON PLAINTIFF. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO MISREPRESENTATION OR INTENT TO MISLEAD. ATTY WILEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Off Calendar May-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN WILEY, TEL. NO. 863-0500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT E. AUNE OF THE AUNE & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-6400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT 101 LOMBARD STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, EVEN ASSUMING THAT THE RULE OF DEFERENCE APPLIES. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT PROCEEDED ARBITRARILY RATHER THAN IN BAD FAITH BY IMPOSING A DISPROPORTIONATE BURDEN ON PLAINTIFF. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO MISREPRESENTATION OR INTENT TO MISLEAD. ATTY WILEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/ER)
